actions.text: The annual St Patrick's Day parade in London is attended by a large crowd of Irish people.

actions.text: A 71-year-old man has died after being struck by a Mitsubishi Space Star people carrier on the A35 at Burley, in the New Forest.

actions.text: United Utilities said a burst caused "significant damage" to a water pipe in Royton, Greater Manchester.

actions.text: Polling stations are open from 07:00 to 22:00 BST on Thursday, with 4,285,323 people - 97% of the electorate - registered to vote.

actions.text: A 22-year-old man was attacked near the restaurant, on Argyle Street, at about 02:30 on Monday 25 January.

actions.text: Boco, 32, has joined Orient from Portsmouth in February 2016 and has scored seven goals in 38 appearances for the club last season.

actions.text: Tyson Fury's cousin, Ryan Ellis, will face WBO champion Parker in Auckland, New Zealand, on 6 May, in his first world title fight.
